data.title: Argentine President Javier Milei Launches Investigation Into Libra Crypto
data.description:
Libra crypto, a Solana-native token, saw 94% crash after market debut owing to massive insider sales of over $107 million. This has also kicked-up a world-wide uproar and political nightmare for Argentine President, Javier Milei due to having initially endorsed the coin. He later withdrew his support stating, “I was not familiar with the details […]
The post Argentine President Javier Milei...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/16/argentine-president-javier-milei-launches-investigation-into-libra-crypto/

Billionaire Warren Buffett Pours $1,200,000,000 Into New Asset, Dumps $5,500,000,000 of Berkshire Hathaway’s Exposure To Bank of America
data.description:
Warren Buffett continues to unload billions of dollars of Berkshire Hathaway’s stake in Bank of America (BAC). New SEC filings show Buffett sold 117.4 million shares of BAC worth about $5.5 billion in the fourth quarter of 2024, reducing its stake in the financial giant to 8.9%. Meanwhile, Berkshire added a new investment in the […]
The post Billionaire Warren Buffett Pours $1,200,000,000 Into...

data.title: Ai16z Founder Addresses Unauthorized Social Media Posts
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on February 17, ai16z founder Shaw announced on social media that unauthorized posts have been made on his X account. He is currently addressing the issue and developing a solution. Shaw advised followers not to click on or purchase anything from these posts.

data.title: Insiders Cash Out $107,000,000 in Crypto Before Memecoin Backed by Argentinian President Collapsed: Lookonchain
data.description:
Insiders extracted over $100 million from crypto markets after Argentinian President Javier Milei backed the launch of a memecoin that was supposedly designed to support the growth of the country. In a now-deleted post, Milei announced the launch of LIBRA, a token designed for “encouraging the growth of the Argentine economy,” along with a Solana […]

data.title: Greeks.live: Bitcoin continues to fluctuate below $100,000, and the market's wealth-creating effect is weak
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam posted on the X platform that the most noteworthy macro news this week is the news from the United States and Europe about the Russian-Ukrainian war. The Russian-Ukrainian war has always been an important reason for the rise in commodity prices. If the relevant situation changes, it may cause a change in the overall inflation logic. In terms of encryption, this week is the opening of Consensus Hong Kong, and there are many related meetings. At the same time, FTX will begin to repay creditors, which are all worth paying attention to. The EU Crypto-Asset Markets Act (MiCA) has fully come into effect, and compliant exchanges such as Kraken have gradually removed stablecoins such as USDT from the European region.
The encryption market continues to be sluggish, and Bitcoin continues to fluctuate below $100,000. The farce of Mile's coin issuance has exacerbated the downturn of altcoins. The market's wealth-making effect is relatively weak, and the market is very pessimistic. In terms of options, the full-term IV continues to decline, and the month's par IV has fallen to 45%. Recently, it is mainly large-scale position adjustments.

data.title: OKX adjusts GLMUSDT perpetual contract funding settlement frequency
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX plans to adjust the funding settlement frequency of the GLMUSDT perpetual contract from every 8 hours to every 4 hours on February 17, 2025. After the adjustment, the funding will be settled at 0:00 am, 4:00 am, 8:00 am, 12:00 noon, 4:00 pm, and 8:00 pm every day. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
